name: apartmanweb
description: Apartment management MVP (tahakkuk, odeme, kapama, ekstre, role-based auth)

scripts.kill:3000: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; exit 0"
scripts.dev:local: npm run kill:3000 && npm run dev
scripts.check:api: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/health' -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output ('API OK ' + $r.StatusCode + ' ' + $r.Content) } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { Write-Output ('API HTTP ' + $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__) } else { Write-Output ('API ERR ' + $_.Exception.Message) } }"
scripts.test:e2e:prepare: npm run test:e2e:safety && npm run seed:admin && npm run seed:charge-types && npm run seed:expense-items && npm run seed:payment-methods && npm run seed:residents
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:safety && npm run test:e2e:prepare && npm run kill:3000 && npm --prefix frontend run kill:5173 && playwright test
scripts.test:critical: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
